records.m_Talk_ENG:
I fully anticipated that a saboteur would show up
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
I fully anticipated that a saboteur would show up
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
I fully anticipated that a saboteur would show up
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: But a monster protecting a human is unexpected.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But a monster protecting a human is unexpected.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But a monster protecting a human is unexpected.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why is this monster... blocking my path?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why is this monster... blocking my path?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why is this monster... blocking my path?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You do not even fight back... but why are you stopping me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You do not even fight back... but why are you stopping me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You do not even fight back... but why are you stopping me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Morgana...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Morgana...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Morgana...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why do you call this monster by that name...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why do you call this monster by that name...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why do you call this monster by that name...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>The old king of Avalon, slain by the traitor, will be reborn in the gelid lands and lead the Stump.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>The old king of Avalon, slain by the traitor, will be reborn in the gelid lands and lead the Stump.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>The old king of Avalon, slain by the traitor, will be reborn in the gelid lands and lead the Stump.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>The girl born with a horn will protect her home, and she will lose her heart to the devil of the Stump.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>The girl born with a horn will protect her home, and she will lose her heart to the devil of the Stump.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>The girl born with a horn will protect her home, and she will lose her heart to the devil of the Stump.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Heart...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Heart...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Heart...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. This cannot be.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. This cannot be.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. This cannot be.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That child should be passing through Avalon's Gate by now...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That child should be passing through Avalon's Gate by now...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That child should be passing through Avalon's Gate by now...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The white monster slowly moved her hand and wrapped it around Merlin's shoulder.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The white monster slowly moved her hand and wrapped it around Merlin's shoulder.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The white monster slowly moved her hand and wrapped it around Merlin's shoulder.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Her touch was delicate, as if handling a precious flower...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Her touch was delicate, as if handling a precious flower...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Her touch was delicate, as if handling a precious flower...

records.m_Talk_ENG: She stroked Merlin's face.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She stroked Merlin's face.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She stroked Merlin's face.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The only form of an attack... the monster who had her heart pierced did.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The only form of an attack... the monster who had her heart pierced did.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The only form of an attack... the monster who had her heart pierced did.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The white monster then... quietly leaned on Merlin's shoulder, and drew her last breath.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The white monster then... quietly leaned on Merlin's shoulder, and drew her last breath.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The white monster then... quietly leaned on Merlin's shoulder, and drew her last breath.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Haha...
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Haha...
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Haha...

records.m_Talk_ENG: After...
records.m_Talk_DEU: After...
records.m_Talk_FRA: After...

records.m_Talk_ENG: After waiting for eons to save you...
records.m_Talk_DEU: After waiting for eons to save you...
records.m_Talk_FRA: After waiting for eons to save you...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I... could not change anything.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I... could not change anything.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I... could not change anything.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You... seem to be in pain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You... seem to be in pain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You... seem to be in pain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: More than when you were hurting the person in front of you...
records.m_Talk_DEU: More than when you were hurting the person in front of you...
records.m_Talk_FRA: More than when you were hurting the person in front of you...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who was the monster to you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who was the monster to you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who was the monster to you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I wish I could make you feel this emotion time and time again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I wish I could make you feel this emotion time and time again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I wish I could make you feel this emotion time and time again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...It will not happen.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...It will not happen.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...It will not happen.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For an eternity... I will not be able to feel a greater sense of loss than this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For an eternity... I will not be able to feel a greater sense of loss than this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For an eternity... I will not be able to feel a greater sense of loss than this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that so?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that so?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that so?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, I have no reason to keep you alive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, I have no reason to keep you alive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, I have no reason to keep you alive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Demon Lord...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Demon Lord...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Demon Lord...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It wasn't enough for you to hate and destroy humanity... you had to ridicule them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It wasn't enough for you to hate and destroy humanity... you had to ridicule them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It wasn't enough for you to hate and destroy humanity... you had to ridicule them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You really are a horrible creature.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You really are a horrible creature.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You really are a horrible creature.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Indeed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Indeed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Indeed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I enjoy your sufferings.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I enjoy your sufferings.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I enjoy your sufferings.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Much like how the world made you its Antagonist...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Much like how the world made you its Antagonist...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Much like how the world made you its Antagonist...

records.m_Talk_ENG: it is the world's will that I was made like this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: it is the world's will that I was made like this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: it is the world's will that I was made like this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you saying that it was the world... that made you like that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you saying that it was the world... that made you like that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you saying that it was the world... that made you like that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The blistering cold and the plague. Birthrights and fate. Humans cannot choose any of these things for themselves.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The blistering cold and the plague. Birthrights and fate. Humans cannot choose any of these things for themselves.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The blistering cold and the plague. Birthrights and fate. Humans cannot choose any of these things for themselves.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Like a prophecy... it all flows toward a predetermined conclusion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Like a prophecy... it all flows toward a predetermined conclusion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Like a prophecy... it all flows toward a predetermined conclusion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're saying that it's inevitable because it's all predetermined...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're saying that it's inevitable because it's all predetermined...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're saying that it's inevitable because it's all predetermined...?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Did you look down on the efforts of those who fight desperately to right this twisted fate
8v?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Did you look down on the efforts of those who fight desperately to right this twisted fate
8v?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Did you look down on the efforts of those who fight desperately to right this twisted fate
8v?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...How dare you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...How dare you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...How dare you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Khhk...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Khhk...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Khhk...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How foolish of you to shoot me while ignoring the devil that is trying to kill you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: How foolish of you to shoot me while ignoring the devil that is trying to kill you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: How foolish of you to shoot me while ignoring the devil that is trying to kill you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Plus, you missed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Plus, you missed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Plus, you missed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No...
records.m_Talk_DEU: No...
records.m_Talk_FRA: No...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I got you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I got you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I got you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm...? When did the strings...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm...? When did the strings...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm...? When did the strings...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kuh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kuh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kuh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am finally free.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am finally free.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am finally free.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It feels horrible to be controlled by another.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It feels horrible to be controlled by another.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It feels horrible to be controlled by another.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Were you aiming for the strings to set that devil free from the start?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Were you aiming for the strings to set that devil free from the start?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Were you aiming for the strings to set that devil free from the start?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because even if I aimed at your heart, you wouldn't have died so easily.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because even if I aimed at your heart, you wouldn't have died so easily.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because even if I aimed at your heart, you wouldn't have died so easily.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So... What difference does it make by you saving a single devil?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So... What difference does it make by you saving a single devil?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So... What difference does it make by you saving a single devil?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It will be a far easier task for me to end you myself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It will be a far easier task for me to end you myself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It will be a far easier task for me to end you myself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Once you annihilate this world...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Once you annihilate this world...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Once you annihilate this world...

records.m_Talk_ENG: will your hatred stop?
records.m_Talk_DEU: will your hatred stop?
records.m_Talk_FRA: will your hatred stop?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course not.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course not.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course not.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your end is merely my beginning.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your end is merely my beginning.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your end is merely my beginning.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As I sat on the Demon Lord's throne, I learned the truths beyond this world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As I sat on the Demon Lord's throne, I learned the truths beyond this world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As I sat on the Demon Lord's throne, I learned the truths beyond this world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And until I reach it, I will remove anything and everything that stands in my way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And until I reach it, I will remove anything and everything that stands in my way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And until I reach it, I will remove anything and everything that stands in my way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course... I knew you wouldn't quit so easily.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course... I knew you wouldn't quit so easily.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course... I knew you wouldn't quit so easily.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If avoiding fate means that I have to leave behind the things I cherish...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If avoiding fate means that I have to leave behind the things I cherish...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If avoiding fate means that I have to leave behind the things I cherish...

records.m_Talk_ENG: then I'd rather accept my fate instead.
records.m_Talk_DEU: then I'd rather accept my fate instead.
records.m_Talk_FRA: then I'd rather accept my fate instead.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Merlin, I have a favor to ask.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Merlin, I have a favor to ask.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Merlin, I have a favor to ask.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As a devil, how much is my soul worth to you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: As a devil, how much is my soul worth to you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: As a devil, how much is my soul worth to you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you thinking of doing?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you thinking of doing?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you thinking of doing?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I offer my soul to you, will I be able to defeat the Demon Lord?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I offer my soul to you, will I be able to defeat the Demon Lord?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I offer my soul to you, will I be able to defeat the Demon Lord?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't do that. Are you deliberately trying to get involved in the prophecy now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't do that. Are you deliberately trying to get involved in the prophecy now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't do that. Are you deliberately trying to get involved in the prophecy now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if you offer the soul of the Antagonist...! I cannot guarantee that you will win!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if you offer the soul of the Antagonist...! I cannot guarantee that you will win!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if you offer the soul of the Antagonist...! I cannot guarantee that you will win!

records.m_Talk_ENG: So you're not certain, but it's worth a shot.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So you're not certain, but it's worth a shot.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So you're not certain, but it's worth a shot.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think you misunderstand something. A contract with a devil does not grant you the power to save the world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think you misunderstand something. A contract with a devil does not grant you the power to save the world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think you misunderstand something. A contract with a devil does not grant you the power to save the world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if you somehow manage to survive, you will be tainted in darkness without an ounce of humanity left.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if you somehow manage to survive, you will be tainted in darkness without an ounce of humanity left.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if you somehow manage to survive, you will be tainted in darkness without an ounce of humanity left.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The night is darkest just before sunrise.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The night is darkest just before sunrise.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The night is darkest just before sunrise.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if I face pitch-black darkness,
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if I face pitch-black darkness,
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if I face pitch-black darkness,

records.m_Talk_ENG: if that darkness can promise me a hope for tomorrow...
records.m_Talk_DEU: if that darkness can promise me a hope for tomorrow...
records.m_Talk_FRA: if that darkness can promise me a hope for tomorrow...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will gladly embrace it and move forward.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will gladly embrace it and move forward.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will gladly embrace it and move forward.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You...
records.m_Talk_DEU: You...
records.m_Talk_FRA: You...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you feel it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you feel it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you feel it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The last remaining life in the Stump has vanished.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The last remaining life in the Stump has vanished.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The last remaining life in the Stump has vanished.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is your defeat, being unable to protect anything.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is your defeat, being unable to protect anything.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is your defeat, being unable to protect anything.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Like you said... it seems that we lost.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Like you said... it seems that we lost.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Like you said... it seems that we lost.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We were ultimately unable to escape the bondage of the prophecy that we desperately desired...
records.m_Talk_DEU: We were ultimately unable to escape the bondage of the prophecy that we desperately desired...
records.m_Talk_FRA: We were ultimately unable to escape the bondage of the prophecy that we desperately desired...

records.m_Talk_ENG: We failed to keep the promise that we would all head to the Promised Land.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We failed to keep the promise that we would all head to the Promised Land.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We failed to keep the promise that we would all head to the Promised Land.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is no reason for us to give up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is no reason for us to give up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is no reason for us to give up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This will be...
records.m_Talk_DEU: This will be...
records.m_Talk_FRA: This will be...

records.m_Talk_ENG: the second time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: the second time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: the second time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Impossible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Impossible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Impossible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How... could I not avoid such an obvious bullet?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How... could I not avoid such an obvious bullet?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How... could I not avoid such an obvious bullet?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You know as well as I do, Thagirion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You know as well as I do, Thagirion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You know as well as I do, Thagirion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter how great your powers may be...
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter how great your powers may be...
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter how great your powers may be...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are not able to escape from fate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are not able to escape from fate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are not able to escape from fate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is that so?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is that so?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is that so?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, I have no reason to keep you alive.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, I have no reason to keep you alive.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, I have no reason to keep you alive.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Demon Lord...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Demon Lord...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Demon Lord...

root.m_Talk_ENG: It wasn't enough for you to hate and destroy humanity... you had to ridicule them.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It wasn't enough for you to hate and destroy humanity... you had to ridicule them.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It wasn't enough for you to hate and destroy humanity... you had to ridicule them.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You really are a horrible creature.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You really are a horrible creature.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You really are a horrible creature.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Indeed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Indeed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Indeed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I enjoy your sufferings.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I enjoy your sufferings.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I enjoy your sufferings.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Much like how the world made you its Antagonist...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Much like how the world made you its Antagonist...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Much like how the world made you its Antagonist...

root.m_Talk_ENG: it is the world's will that I was made like this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: it is the world's will that I was made like this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: it is the world's will that I was made like this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you saying that it was the world... that made you like that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you saying that it was the world... that made you like that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you saying that it was the world... that made you like that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The blistering cold and the plague. Birthrights and fate. Humans cannot choose any of these things for themselves.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The blistering cold and the plague. Birthrights and fate. Humans cannot choose any of these things for themselves.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The blistering cold and the plague. Birthrights and fate. Humans cannot choose any of these things for themselves.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Like a prophecy... it all flows toward a predetermined conclusion.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Like a prophecy... it all flows toward a predetermined conclusion.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Like a prophecy... it all flows toward a predetermined conclusion.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're saying that it's inevitable because it's all predetermined...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're saying that it's inevitable because it's all predetermined...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're saying that it's inevitable because it's all predetermined...?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Did you look down on the efforts of those who fight desperately to right this twisted fate
8v?
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Did you look down on the efforts of those who fight desperately to right this twisted fate
8v?
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Did you look down on the efforts of those who fight desperately to right this twisted fate
8v?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...How dare you!
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...How dare you!
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...How dare you!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Khhk...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Khhk...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Khhk...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: How foolish of you to shoot me while ignoring the devil that is trying to kill you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: How foolish of you to shoot me while ignoring the devil that is trying to kill you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: How foolish of you to shoot me while ignoring the devil that is trying to kill you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Plus, you missed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Plus, you missed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Plus, you missed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No...
root.m_Talk_DEU: No...
root.m_Talk_FRA: No...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I got you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I got you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I got you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm...? When did the strings...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm...? When did the strings...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm...? When did the strings...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kuh...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kuh...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kuh...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I am finally free.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I am finally free.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I am finally free.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It feels horrible to be controlled by another.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It feels horrible to be controlled by another.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It feels horrible to be controlled by another.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Were you aiming for the strings to set that devil free from the start?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Were you aiming for the strings to set that devil free from the start?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Were you aiming for the strings to set that devil free from the start?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because even if I aimed at your heart, you wouldn't have died so easily.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because even if I aimed at your heart, you wouldn't have died so easily.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because even if I aimed at your heart, you wouldn't have died so easily.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So... What difference does it make by you saving a single devil?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So... What difference does it make by you saving a single devil?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So... What difference does it make by you saving a single devil?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It will be a far easier task for me to end you myself.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It will be a far easier task for me to end you myself.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It will be a far easier task for me to end you myself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Once you annihilate this world...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Once you annihilate this world...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Once you annihilate this world...

root.m_Talk_ENG: will your hatred stop?
root.m_Talk_DEU: will your hatred stop?
root.m_Talk_FRA: will your hatred stop?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course not.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course not.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course not.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Your end is merely my beginning.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Your end is merely my beginning.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Your end is merely my beginning.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As I sat on the Demon Lord's throne, I learned the truths beyond this world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As I sat on the Demon Lord's throne, I learned the truths beyond this world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As I sat on the Demon Lord's throne, I learned the truths beyond this world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And until I reach it, I will remove anything and everything that stands in my way.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And until I reach it, I will remove anything and everything that stands in my way.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And until I reach it, I will remove anything and everything that stands in my way.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course... I knew you wouldn't quit so easily.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course... I knew you wouldn't quit so easily.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course... I knew you wouldn't quit so easily.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If avoiding fate means that I have to leave behind the things I cherish...
root.m_Talk_DEU: If avoiding fate means that I have to leave behind the things I cherish...
root.m_Talk_FRA: If avoiding fate means that I have to leave behind the things I cherish...

root.m_Talk_ENG: then I'd rather accept my fate instead.
root.m_Talk_DEU: then I'd rather accept my fate instead.
root.m_Talk_FRA: then I'd rather accept my fate instead.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Merlin, I have a favor to ask.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Merlin, I have a favor to ask.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Merlin, I have a favor to ask.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As a devil, how much is my soul worth to you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: As a devil, how much is my soul worth to you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: As a devil, how much is my soul worth to you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What are you thinking of doing?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What are you thinking of doing?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What are you thinking of doing?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I offer my soul to you, will I be able to defeat the Demon Lord?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I offer my soul to you, will I be able to defeat the Demon Lord?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I offer my soul to you, will I be able to defeat the Demon Lord?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't do that. Are you deliberately trying to get involved in the prophecy now?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't do that. Are you deliberately trying to get involved in the prophecy now?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't do that. Are you deliberately trying to get involved in the prophecy now?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if you offer the soul of the Antagonist...! I cannot guarantee that you will win!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if you offer the soul of the Antagonist...! I cannot guarantee that you will win!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if you offer the soul of the Antagonist...! I cannot guarantee that you will win!

root.m_Talk_ENG: So you're not certain, but it's worth a shot.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So you're not certain, but it's worth a shot.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So you're not certain, but it's worth a shot.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I think you misunderstand something. A contract with a devil does not grant you the power to save the world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I think you misunderstand something. A contract with a devil does not grant you the power to save the world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I think you misunderstand something. A contract with a devil does not grant you the power to save the world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if you somehow manage to survive, you will be tainted in darkness without an ounce of humanity left.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if you somehow manage to survive, you will be tainted in darkness without an ounce of humanity left.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if you somehow manage to survive, you will be tainted in darkness without an ounce of humanity left.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The night is darkest just before sunrise.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The night is darkest just before sunrise.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The night is darkest just before sunrise.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if I face pitch-black darkness,
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if I face pitch-black darkness,
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if I face pitch-black darkness,

root.m_Talk_ENG: if that darkness can promise me a hope for tomorrow...
root.m_Talk_DEU: if that darkness can promise me a hope for tomorrow...
root.m_Talk_FRA: if that darkness can promise me a hope for tomorrow...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I will gladly embrace it and move forward.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I will gladly embrace it and move forward.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I will gladly embrace it and move forward.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You...
root.m_Talk_DEU: You...
root.m_Talk_FRA: You...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you feel it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you feel it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you feel it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The last remaining life in the Stump has vanished.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The last remaining life in the Stump has vanished.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The last remaining life in the Stump has vanished.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It is your defeat, being unable to protect anything.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It is your defeat, being unable to protect anything.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It is your defeat, being unable to protect anything.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Like you said... it seems that we lost.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Like you said... it seems that we lost.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Like you said... it seems that we lost.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We were ultimately unable to escape the bondage of the prophecy that we desperately desired...
root.m_Talk_DEU: We were ultimately unable to escape the bondage of the prophecy that we desperately desired...
root.m_Talk_FRA: We were ultimately unable to escape the bondage of the prophecy that we desperately desired...

root.m_Talk_ENG: We failed to keep the promise that we would all head to the Promised Land.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We failed to keep the promise that we would all head to the Promised Land.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We failed to keep the promise that we would all head to the Promised Land.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But...

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is no reason for us to give up.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is no reason for us to give up.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is no reason for us to give up.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This will be...
root.m_Talk_DEU: This will be...
root.m_Talk_FRA: This will be...

root.m_Talk_ENG: the second time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: the second time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: the second time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Impossible.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Impossible.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Impossible.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How... could I not avoid such an obvious bullet?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How... could I not avoid such an obvious bullet?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How... could I not avoid such an obvious bullet?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You know as well as I do, Thagirion.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You know as well as I do, Thagirion.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You know as well as I do, Thagirion.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No matter how great your powers may be...
root.m_Talk_DEU: No matter how great your powers may be...
root.m_Talk_FRA: No matter how great your powers may be...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You are not able to escape from fate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You are not able to escape from fate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You are not able to escape from fate.
